fields.name: ``\pop <user>``
fields.value: Calls the user a pop pop head.

fields.name: ``\colourme (#xxxxxx|clear)``
fields.value: Applies a role of the same colour to you, or removes any colour roles you have.

fields.name: ``\summon <user>``
fields.value: Summons the user to your activity.

fields.name: ``\serverip``
fields.value: Displays the current in-use IP address for the minecraft server.

fields.name: ``\uptime``
fields.value: Returns the amount of time I have been online.

fields.name: ``\rule34 <query>``
fields.value: Finds a naughty image related to your query.
